cedict_en: like that; in that way; to that extent/(before a number) ... or so; about .../then; in that case | variant of 那麼|那么[na4 me5]
merely; only; just; nothing but/simply/but; however
research/a study/CL:項|项[xiang4]/to research/to look into
to come out/to appear/to arise | (after a verb, indicates coming out, completion of an action, or ability to discern or detect)

only have ...; there is only .../(used in combination with 才[cai2]) it is only if ... (that one can ...) (as in 只有通過治療才能痊愈|只有通过治疗才能痊愈[zhi3 you3 tong1 guo4 zhi4 liao2 cai2 neng2 quan2 yu4] "the only way to cure it is with therapy")/it is only (someone) who ... (as in 只有男性才有此需要[zhi3 you3 nan2 xing4 cai2 you3 ci3 xu1 yao4] "only men would have such a requirement")/(used to express lack of alternatives) can only; have no choice but to (as in 只有屈服[zhi3 you3 qu1 fu2] "the only thing you can do is give in")
(bound form) self; oneself/from; since/naturally; as a matter of course
variant of 這裡|这里[zhe4 li3] | here
surname Guo | country; nation; state/(bound form) national
